title: calea peduncularis var. longifolia
intro: Calea peduncularis var. longifolia, also known as Mexican Damiana Longifolia, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an adaptogen, nervine, and sedative. The plant has been traditionally used to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality, as well as to enhance libido and treat various reproductive issues. Calea peduncularis var. longifolia can be found in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often consumed to reap its health benefits and medicinal properties.
